title: viola × contempta
intro: Viola × contempta, also known as the hybrid pansy, is a cross between Viola x wittrockiana and Viola x damlurii. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola × contempta include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Viola × contempta can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
